title: Yama Copper Pressure Plates
description: A Fabric/NeoForge mod which adds copper pressure plates that can be triggered only by players
body:
_Ever wanted to secure your house entrance and restrict any mobs from opening doors? Well, now you can._

This mod simply adds Vanilla-friendly copper pressure plates which can be triggered **only** by players.

- Copper pressure plates weather through all vanilla stages: `Unaffected` → `Exposed` → `Weathered` → `Oxidized`
- Plates can be waxed by right-clicking with a honeycomb in hand, just like vanilla copper blocks
- Waxing is also available via crafting table by combining a plate with a honeycomb
- All waxed variants can be unwaxed by scraping with an axe

Crafting is affordable and reasonable:

| Default | Already Waxed |
| ------- | ----- |
| ![Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0ac1fdef31ce0e40d4c0175d9f3251383d8d025.png) | ![Crafting recipe with wax](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bceb3647c7690727a2d86ea0983149168821751c.png) |

> Modpack usage is available as long as you give credit.
